(Rajoguna). So also Mars has Rajoguna. It is also said that Mars
represents the commander-in-Chief of the Army; Sun-The king
and Guru-Raja Purohit. Thus Mars is the friend of Sun and
Jupiter.
Dragon Tail indicates Sanyasa or renunciation. After
reaching the pinnacle of power, one ultimately renounces the
world. The ancient Rajas' and Maharajas used to take to
Vanaprasthashrama, after handing over the Kingdom to their
successors, after reaching a certain age. In modem days fall from
the pinnacle of power, makes one to renounce politics.
MERCURY
Mercury is the planet of intellect, who likes Atrnodharaka
Ravi (The Sun). Intellect also likes work i.e., Saturn. Mercury is
affectionate with Dragon Head.

32 FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY
Mercury enjoys good name through Dragon Head.
According to mythology, when Demon was created, Lord Maha
Vishnu (The Saviour-Jagat Rakshaka) came forward and
destroyed the demon. Mercury is the emlxx:lying concept of Lord
Mahavishnu.
